title: Clavicular arrest update: Florida streamer allegedly instigated fight between women on stream
summary_full: Looksmaxxing streamer Clavicular, real name Braden Eric Peters, is jailed in Florida for allegedly inciting a fight between two women at an Airbnb. Police claim he provoked the altercation for social media views, leading to misdemeanor battery and criminal conspiracy charges. His alleged girlfriend, Violet Marie Lentz, also faces battery charges and remains at large.
